section1_body_description: UAB Kompservisas specializes in trade and servicing of used business-class computers. We started our business in the year 2000 under the name "Kibirnetas". With {{value}} years of experience in the market, we ensure the quality of the services provided and guarantee the performance and durability of the electronics we sell.
section2_body_description: We are open to collaboration proposals. We can supply computer equipment for your office, public institution, or municipal facility. We personally inspect all the equipment we sell. We provide warranties, issue invoices, and offer equipment leasing. Contact us by clicking the 'Contact' button or by calling the following phone numbers: +370 699 69578, +370 699 62246.
